source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/260123 태국 Hollywood, 23G 및 P1 등록서류 - 이창민 팀장님/260324 추가요청 2. 디텍터 doc 외/11. Safety Declaration (Rev).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Product Owner safety declaration to the Thai Food and Drug Administration for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Submitted to support a medical device registration application by declaring no global safety issues, deaths, serious deterioration, or open field safety corrective actions in the specified one-year period.
keyPoints: H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares it is the Product Owner of the listed medical devices.
The declaration covers the period from 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026.
The declaration states there were no reported deaths, no reported serious deterioration in health, and no open field safety corrective actions at submission.
The listed product is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model names A1417MCW, A1717MCW, and F1417MCW.
The declaration references the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562), and other applicable laws.

concepts.name: No open field safety corrective actions
concepts.evidence: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

evidence.claim: The declaration states there were no global safety issues when the device was used as intended during the last one year from 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026.
evidence.evidenceText: there are no safety issues globally associated with the use of the medical device( s) when used as intended by the Product Owner, in the last one year from 30/01/2025 to 30/01/2026

evidence.claim: The declaration states no reported deaths.
The declaration states no reported serious deterioration in the state of health of any person.

evidence.evidenceText: No open field safety corrective actions (including recalls) at the point of submission of this application.

evidence.claim: The declaration references offences under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562), and other applicable laws.
evidence.evidenceText: making a declaration which I know to be false is an offence under the Medical Device Act (B.E.2551), Medical Device Act (2nd edition B.E.2562) and other applicable laws

evidence.claim: Non-compliance with registration conditions issued by the Thai FDA may result in suspension or cancellation of medical device registration.
evidence.evidenceText: any non-compliance with any registration condition issued by the Thai Food and Drug Administration in relation to medical devices registered with the Medical Device Control Division may result in the suspension or cancellation of the medical devices registration.
